title: senecio chrysanthemum var. chrysanthemum
intro: Senecio chrysanthemum var. chrysanthemum, also known as buttercup ragwort or Chrysanthemum ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that has a history of traditional medicinal use. The plant has been used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. In terms of health benefits, Senecio chrysanthemum var. chrysanthemum has been traditionally used to treat various conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and menstrual disorders, as well as to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
